mapper.select:
SELECT TCS.ID "id", TO_CHAR(CASE WHEN TBH.LOAD_UNLOAD = '卸' THEN TDSI.WORK_START_TIME ELSE (CASE WHEN TBH.LOAD_UNLOAD = '装' THEN TEMP.WEIGH_OUT_DT END) END, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') "inTime" FROM T_COST_STATEMENT TCS JOIN T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST TBH on TCS.HANDOVERLIST_ID = TBH.ID JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TBH.ID, MIN(TEMP2.WEIGH_OUT_DT) WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST TBH JOIN ( SELECT ID, ID ROOT_ID FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO WHERE ROOT_ID IS NULL UNION SELECT ID, ROOT_ID FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO WHERE ROOT_ID IS NOT NULL ) TBCI ON TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID JOIN ( SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM ( SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP2 ON TBCI.ROOT_ID = TEMP2.CARGO_INFO_ID GROUP BY TBH.ID ) TEMP ON TBH.ID = TEMP.ID WHERE TCS.ID IN
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, STATEMENT, CONTRACT_ID, RATE_ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, "NUMBER", AMOUNT, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_DERIVED, TRATE_ITEM_ID, PREFERENTIAL_RATE FROM T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL WHERE STATEMENT = #{statementId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND "NUMBER" != '0' ORDER BY CREATE_TIME DESC

SELECT ID, STATEMENT, CONTRACT_ID, RATE_ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, "NUMBER", AMOUNT, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_DERIVED, TRATE_ITEM_ID, PREFERENTIAL_RATE FROM T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL WHERE STATEMENT = #{statementId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY CREATE_TIME DESC

SELECT TBC.ID TBC_ID, TBC.CONTACT_NO TBC_CONTACT_NO, TBC.PARENT_ID TBC_PARENT_ID, TBC.CUSTOMER_ID TBC_CUSTOMER_ID, TBC.CUSTOMER_NAME TBC_CUSTOMER_NAME
FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC
TBC.ID IN
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TBC.ID TBC_ID, TCS.ID TCS_ID, TBC.CONTACT_NO TBC_CONTACT_NO, TBC.PARENT_ID TBC_PARENT_ID, TBC.CUSTOMER_ID TBC_CUSTOMER_ID, TBC.CUSTOMER_NAME TBC_CUSTOMER_NAME, TBC.SIGN_TIME TBC_SIGN_TIME, TBC.CONTRACT_TYPE TBC_CONTRACT_TYPE, TBC.IS_SHIP TBC_IS_SHIP, TBC.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE TBC_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME TBC_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.OUTER_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME OUTER_SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.DEPOSIT_BASIS_CODE TBC_DEPOSIT_BASIS_CODE, TBC.DEPOSIT_BASIS_NAME TBC_DEPOSIT_BASIS_NAME, TBC.DEPOSIT_RATIO TBC_DEPOSIT_RATIO, TBC.PAY_TYPE TBC_PAY_TYPE, TBC.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS TBC_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TBC.START_TIME TBC_START_TIME, TBC.END_TIME TBC_END_TIME, TBC.SHIPVOYAGE_ID TBC_SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TBC.VALID_BY TBC_VALID_BY, TBC.VALID_BY_NAME TBC_VALID_BY_NAME, TBC.VALID_TIME TBC_VALID_TIME, TBC.STATUS TBC_STATUS, TBC.REMARK TBC_REMARK, TBC.CREATE_BY TBC_CREATE_BY, TBC.CREATE_BY_NAME TBC_CREATE_BY_NAME, TBC.CREATE_TIME TBC_CREATE_TIME, TBC.UPDATE_BY TBC_UPDATE_BY, TBC.UPDATE_BY_NAME TBC_UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBC.UPDATE_TIME TBC_UPDATE_TIME, TBC.COMPANY_NAMES TBC_COMPANY_NAMES, TBCR.ID TBCR_ID, TBCR.CONTRACT_ID TBCR_CONTRACT_ID, TBCR.CARGO_CODE TBCR_CARGO_CODE, TBCR.CARGO_NAME TBCR_CARGO_NAME, TBCR.RATE_ITEM_CODE TBCR_RATE_ITEM_CODE, TBCR.RATE_ITEM_NAME TBCR_RATE_ITEM_NAME, TBCR.TRADE_TYPE TBCR_TRADE_TYPE, TBCR.SERVICE_CONTENT_ID TBCR_SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, TBCR.SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME TBCR_SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, TBCR.PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE TBCR_PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, TBCR.PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME TBCR_PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, TBCR.PAYMENT_DAYS TBCR_PAYMENT_DAYS, TBCR.RATE TBCR_RATE, TBCR.TAX TBCR_TAX, TBCR.UNIT_CODE TBCR_UNIT_CODE, TBCR.UNIT_NAME TBCR_UNIT_NAME, TBCR.CREATE_BY TBCR_CREATE_BY, TBCR.CREATE_BY_NAME TBCR_CREATE_BY_NAME, TBCR.CREATE_TIME TBCR_CREATE_TIME, TBCR.UPDATE_BY TBCR_UPDATE_BY, TBCR.UPDATE_BY_NAME TBCR_UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBCR.UPDATE_TIME TBCR_UPDATE_TIME, TBTI.ID TBTI_ID, TBTI.TRATE_ID TBTI_TRATE_ID, TBTI.TRADE_TYPE TBTI_TRADE_TYPE, TBTI.IMP_EXP TBTI_IMP_EXP, TBTI.IS_TIERED_RATE TBTI_IS_TIERED_RATE, TBTI.PREFERENTIAL_RATE TBTI_PREFERENTIAL_RATE, TBTI.ORIGIN_ACC_NUMBER TBTI_ORIGIN_ACC_NUMBER, TBTID.ID TBTID_ID, TBTID.TRATE_ITEM_ID TBTID_TRATE_ITEM_ID, TBTID.BEGIN_TON TBTID_BEGIN_TON, TBTID.END_TON TBTID_END_TON, TBTID.RATE TBTID_RATE FROM T_COST_STATEMENT TCS JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_COMPANY TBCC ON TCS.COMPANY_ID = TBCC.COMPANY_ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON (TBC.STATUS = '20' AND TBCC.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID AND TCS.CUSTOMER_ID = TBC.CUSTOMER_ID AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(TDS.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), 'yyyy-MM-dd') >= TBC.START_TIME AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(TDS.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), 'yyyy-MM-dd') <= TBC.END_TIME) JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR ON (TBC.ID = TBCR.CONTRACT_ID AND TCS.TRADE_TYPE = TBCR.TRADE_TYPE AND TCS.CARGO_CODE = TBCR.CARGO_CODE) LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM TBTI ON (TBCR.TRATE_ITEM_ID = TBTI.ID AND ( TBTI.TRADE_TYPE = '内/外贸' OR TCS.TRADE_TYPE = TBTI.TRADE_TYPE ) AND ( TBTI.IMP_EXP = '进/出口' OR DECODE(TBH.LOAD_UNLOAD, '卸', '进口', '装', '出口') = TBTI.IMP_EXP )) LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM_CARGO TBTIC ON (TBTI.ID = TBTIC.TRATE_ITEM_ID AND TBTIC.CARGO_CODE = TBCR.CARGO_CODE) LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM_DETAIL TBTID ON TBTI.ID = TBTID.TRATE_ITEM_ID WHERE TCS.ID IN
#{statementId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT SUM( "NUMBER" ) FROM T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL WHERE TRATE_ITEM_ID = #{trateItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_COST_STATEMENT SET STATUS = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REJECT_REASON = #{rejectReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REJECT_BY = #{rejectBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REJECT_BY_NAME = #{rejectByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REJECT_TIME = #{rejectTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL SET CONTRACT_ID = #{contractId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, RATE_ID = #{rateId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, RATE_ITEM_CODE = #{rateItemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_ITEM_NAME = #{rateItemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE = #{rate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, UNIT_CODE = #{unitCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UNIT_NAME = #{unitName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AMOUNT = #{amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TAX = #{tax, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TAX_AMOUNT = #{taxAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, IS_DERIVED = #{isDerived, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRATE_ITEM_ID = #{trateItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, PREFERENTIAL_RATE = #{preferentialRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, "NUMBER" = #{number, jdbcType=DECIMAL} WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL(ID, STATEMENT, CONTRACT_ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, "NUMBER", AMOUNT, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, RATE_ID, IS_DERIVED, TRATE_ITEM_ID, PREFERENTIAL_RATE) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{statement, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rateItemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateItemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceContentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{serviceContentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{unitCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{number, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tax, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{rateId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isDerived,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trateItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{preferentialRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL})
mapper.update: UPDATE T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL SET CONTRACT_ID = NULL, RATE_ID = NULL, RATE_ITEM_CODE = NULL, RATE_ITEM_NAME = NULL, RATE = NULL, UNIT_CODE = NULL, UNIT_NAME = NULL, AMOUNT = NULL, TAX = NULL, TAX_AMOUNT = NULL, IS_DERIVED = NULL, TRATE_ITEM_ID = NULL, PREFERENTIAL_RATE = NULL, "NUMBER" = #{number, jdbcType=DECIMAL} WHERE ID = #{statementDetailId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL WHERE ID IN
#{derivedDetailId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATEMENT_NO, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, TYPE, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SETTLEMENT_DATE, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_FINAL, STATEMENT_BY, STATEMENT_BY_NAME, STATEMENT_TIME, REVIEW_BY, REVIEW_BY_NAME, REVIEW_TIME, CONFIRM_BY, CONFIRM_BY_NAME, CONFIRM_TIME FROM T_COST_STATEMENT WHERE ID = #{statementId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select t1.HANDOVERLIST_ID,sum("NUMBER") AS "NUMBER" from T_COST_STATEMENT t1 left join T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL t2 ON t1.ID = t2.STATEMENT AND t1.IS_FINAL = '0' where t1.HANDOVERLIST_ID = (select HANDOVERLIST_ID from T_COST_STATEMENT where ID = #{statementId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) group by t1.HANDOVERLIST_ID

select DISTINCT TMB.* FROM T_MISC_BILLING TMB LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC ON TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = TMB.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT TCS ON TCS.TRUST_CARGO_ID = TBTC.ID LEFT JOIN M_FEE_ITEM MFI ON to_char(MFI.ITEM_CD) = TO_CHAR(TMB.RATE_ITEM_CODE) WHERE MFI.ITEM_TYPE_CD = '2' AND TCS.ID = #{statemetnId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT TCSD.* FROM T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD INNER JOIN T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE TCSS ON TCSD.BUSINESS_ID = TCSS.ID WHERE TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId}

select DISTINCT NVL(TDSD.BERTH_NAME,'') FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC TDSD where (TDSD.DYNAMIC_TYPE_NAME = '靠泊' OR TDSD.DYNAMIC_TYPE_NAME = '移泊') and TDSD.BERTH_NAME is not null AND TDSD.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = ( select SHIPVOYAGE_ID FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM where id = #{shipvoyageItemId} )
